sections.subtitle: Current Form
sections.text: Sint-Truidense VV is in strong form, unbeaten in their last 10 matches with a recent win and a draw in their last two league games. FCV Dender, on the other hand, has struggled to secure a win in their last 6 matches, managing only draws in their recent league outings.

sections.subtitle: Head-to-Head Record
sections.text: In the last two encounters between these teams, matches have been competitive with FCV Dender winning 2-1 at home and a 3-3 draw at Sint-Truidense VV's ground. Both games saw goals from both sides, indicating a high-scoring trend.

sections.subtitle: Season Statistics
sections.text: Sint-Truidense VV ranks higher in the league (3rd) compared to FCV Dender (11th), with better offensive (4 goals scored) and defensive (2 goals conceded) stats. Their ability to create chances (5.5 corners per game) and strong possession play (55.5%) gives them an edge.

sections.subtitle: Key Factors
sections.text: Sint-Truidense VV’s home advantage at Stayen, combined with their superior league position and form, makes them favorites. FCV Dender’s inability to convert chances and recent defensive lapses could be exploited by the hosts.

halftimeSections.subtitle: Half-time overview
halftimeSections.text: At the break, Sint-Truidense VV holds a narrow 1-0 lead over FCV Dender at Stayen. The home side capitalized on a penalty converted by Andrés Ferrari in the 28th minute to secure the advantage. Despite FCV Dender dominating possession throughout much of the first half, Sint-Truidense VV made the most of their opportunity to take the lead. Both teams showed intent in the attacking third, with similar entries into the penalty area, but Sint-Truidense's clinical finishing on their chance proved the difference so far.

halftimeSections.subtitle: Team performance
halftimeSections.text: Sint-Truidense VV has been effective with limited possession, managing to create a big chance and converting it via the penalty. Their defensive structure has held firm despite FCV Dender's higher ball control and more frequent entries into the final third. The home side's ability to win aerial duels has also helped them maintain balance in physical battles. On the other hand, FCV Dender has controlled the game in terms of possession and shown more persistence in pushing forward, evidenced by their higher number of final third entries and shots on target. However, their lack of a cutting edge in front of goal has left them trailing at the interval.

halftimeSections.subtitle: Key players
halftimeSections.text: For Sint-Truidense VV, Andrés Ferrari has been pivotal, confidently slotting home the penalty to give his side the lead. Louis Patris has also stood out with a strong defensive display, winning multiple tackles to disrupt Dender's attacks. On the FCV Dender side, Roman Kvet has been influential in midfield, creating opportunities with key passes, while Luc De Fougerolles has been a rock at the back, contributing with clearances and interceptions. Aurélien Scheidler has looked threatening up front for the away team but has yet to find the net.

halftimeSections.subtitle: Attack momentum analysis
halftimeSections.text: The first half saw FCV Dender starting with strong attacking intent, maintaining pressure in the early minutes with consistent spells of dominance. Sint-Truidense VV had their moments, particularly around the time of their goal, with a noticeable shift in momentum as they pushed forward with purpose. However, Dender regained control for large stretches afterward, showing sustained attacking waves, especially in the latter stages of the half. Sint-Truidense managed to close out the half with a brief resurgence, indicating they are not content to simply defend their lead.

halftimeSections.subtitle: Second half outlook
halftimeSections.text: Looking ahead to the second half, FCV Dender is likely to continue their possession-based approach, seeking to break through Sint-Truidense’s defense with more urgency. Their higher expected goals in the first half suggest they have the potential to equalize if they can sharpen their finishing. Sint-Truidense VV, on the other hand, will probably focus on defending their lead while looking for counter-attacking opportunities to extend it. The home side’s ability to stay compact and exploit set pieces or quick transitions could be key. Expect both teams to push for goals, with Dender likely to press harder as the match progresses.
